description_long: This is a decorative glass bottle with a clear, transparent body, sealed with a natural cork stopper. Inside the bottle, there is a detailed wooden model of a sailing ship, complete with masts, sails, and rigging, all carefully arranged to fit within the confines of the bottle. The bottle is supported by a rectangular wooden stand, which provides stability and elevates the display. The glass surface is smooth and glossy, allowing an unobstructed view of the ship model from all angles. The cork has a textured, natural appearance, contrasting with the sleek glass. No labels, text, or branding are visible on the exterior of the bottle.
description: A clear glass bottle with a cork stopper, containing a wooden model ship and resting on a wooden stand. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and fully transparent, showcasing the intricate ship inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ship's bow through the glass, with the cork and wooden stand visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the ship inside the bottle, the cork on the left, and the wooden stand beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view focused on the cork stopper, with the stern of the ship visible through the glass.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ship's profile, cork on the right, and the wooden stand below.
